name: InMobi Mobile Advertising Platform API
what_it_does: Global mobile advertising network with REST API — providing user acquisition, content recommendation, and mobile programmatic advertising with strong reach in emerging markets (India, Southeast Asia, Africa), first-party consumer data platform (InMobi Pulse), and connected TV advertising capabilities.
use_cases: Launching mobile user acquisition campaigns targeting emerging market audiences via InMobi
Accessing InMobi's first-party consumer intent data for precise mobile audience targeting
Pulling campaign performance data for mobile advertising analytics and optimization
Targeting connected TV (CTV) audiences via InMobi's emerging CTV inventory
Running mobile video and native advertising campaigns across InMobi publisher network
not_for: US/Europe-only campaigns where larger networks (Meta, Google) have better reach
Desktop or web advertising (InMobi is mobile-native)
Small advertisers — meaningful scale requires $10K+ monthly spend minimums
best_when: A brand or app publisher needs to reach mobile audiences in India, Southeast Asia, Middle East, or Africa — where InMobi has the strongest publisher relationships and first-party consumer data.
avoid_when: You primarily target North American or Western European consumers, need enterprise-grade managed service, or don't have mobile-specific creative assets.

auth.notes: API key from InMobi dashboard. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. No webhooks — must poll for reporting. InMobi SDK for publisher monetization. MMP integration for attribution postbacks. No OAuth2. Demand-side access via InMobi DSP. Glance (InMobi subsidiary) for lockscreen advertising in India.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; minimum spend required
pricing.paid_tiers: CPM/CPI/CPA pricing; contact sales; $5K+/month typical minimum
pricing.notes: Indian company (Bangalore). Founded 2007. Raised $200M+ from SoftBank and others. First Indian unicorn startup. 1.6B+ mobile devices reached. 40,000+ app publisher partners. Glance (subsidiary) has 200M+ daily active users on Android lock screens in India/Indonesia/Japan. Pulse Consumer Intelligence platform with first-party data. Strong in India (largest reach), Southeast Asia, Middle East, Africa. Enterprise accounts managed by dedicated account teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for campaigns, audiences, and reporting. API key auth. Moderate public documentation — enterprise accounts get dedicated documentation access. Glance lockscreen advertising has separate API. InMobi Pulse consumer data requires data licensing agreement. No webhooks — polling required. Emerging market-specific compliance (India IT Act, Singapore PDPA) requires local expertise.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Report reads idempotent. Campaign reads idempotent. Creative uploads not idempotent — check by name/hash.
known_agent_gotchas: India Personal Data Protection Bill (DPDP Act 2023) compliance requirements for Indian data
Singapore PDPA compliance for Southeast Asia data — different requirements from GDPR
Glance lockscreen advertising is separate product with separate API and SDK
InMobi Pulse data access requires separate data licensing agreement
Account manager relationship required for enterprise features — not purely self-serve

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, India PDPA/DPDP, Singapore PDPA compliant. Multi-region data residency. API key auth. India DPDP Act (2023) creates new compliance requirements for Indian user data. Southeast Asia data subject to varying national privacy laws. Mobile advertising data includes device identifiers — comply with each country's specific ID and consent requirements.
